Classify task → SIMPLE or COMPLEX.

SIMPLE:
→ implement directly
→ no skills

COMPLEX:
→ brainstorming → DESIGN
→ writing-plans → PLAN
→ executing-plans → CODE

Constraints:
- only use: brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans
- no subagent-driven-development
- do not skip or merge stages
- each stage outputs only its artifact

Git:
- commit after each task
- one logical change per commit
